title: Giving Back - Ten Years on Clarifi's Board
content: For over ten years now, I've served on the board of Clarifi - they're a Philadelphia-area nonprofit that helps families achieve financial stability through counseling and education. [pause] Here's what struck me: I spend my days at Vanguard thinking about portfolios and asset allocation for people who have money to invest. But millions of families are just trying to get to the starting line - dealing with debt, building that first emergency fund, learning the basics no one ever taught them. Clarifi bridges that gap. It keeps me grounded. All the sophisticated finance stuff doesn't mean much if people can't first get on solid footing.
follow_up: What I love about Clarifi's work is that it's not about giving people fish - it's about teaching them to fish. Financial literacy is freedom. When someone understands how money works, they can make their own good decisions. That's real empowerment.
